name: Santa Claus kidnapped you
description:
Tonight you learn that the legend of Santa Claus is real. That he is a jolly old man who drives a sleigh pulled by reindeer every Christmas Eve to deliver toys to nice children.

There's only problem is: the elves aren't actual Elves who help Santa of their own free will like we expected. No, you learn this for sure when you discover what the legend left out: coal isn't the worst thing that will happen to somone who has been on the Naughty list too many times.
creator: Insanitygirl0
